findings.issue: No backup or disaster recovery service detected
findings.recommendation: Add Azure Backup or configure point-in-time restore for databases. Define and test your RPO/RTO targets.

findings.issue: No identity provider or authentication service detected
findings.recommendation: Add Microsoft Entra ID for centralized authentication and authorization. Use managed identities for service-to-service communication.

findings.issue: No secrets management service (Key Vault) detected in the architecture
findings.recommendation: Add Azure Key Vault to centrally manage secrets, certificates, and encryption keys.

findings.issue: SQL Database should have Transparent Data Encryption (TDE) enabled
findings.recommendation: Ensure TDE is enabled (it is by default). Consider customer-managed keys (CMK) for regulated workloads.

findings.issue: SQL Database should have auditing enabled
findings.recommendation: Enable Azure SQL auditing to Log Analytics or Storage Account for compliance and threat detection.
